meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2012 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2012 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, event entries, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2012 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.
